case_title: XAVIER HERNDON VS. REVOLUTION RACING TEAM./ IMPORTRIX

docket_entries.description: DOCUMENTS REQUESTED IN SUBPOENA ISSUED 3/22/21 RECD BY MAIL-FORWARDED TO DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-30-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-30-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF XAVIER HERDON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT REVOUTION RACING TEAM / IMPORTRIX IS NOT PRESENT. PROOF OF SERVICE IS ON FILE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-30-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HERNDON, XAVIER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REVOLUTION RACING TEAM./ IMPORTRIX $1,300.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,300.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

ORDER STRIKING THE DISMISSAL AND THE COURT CONTINUES THE CASE PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)

DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR REVOLUTION RACINT TEAM./IMPORTRIX IS NOT PRESENT. THIRD PARTY JOEL ALVAREZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,500.00 FILED BY HERNDON, XAVIER AS TO DEFENDANT REVOLUTION RACING TEAM./ IMPORTRIX ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-17-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-17-2021 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO AUG-23-2021 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF XAVIER HERNDON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT REVOLUTION RACING TEAM/IMPORTRIX IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. COMMISSIONER: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT

REMOVED FROM SMALL CLAIMS ORDER OF EXAMINATION CALENDAR ON JUL-14-2022 IN DEPT. 506 - MATTER IS RESET FOR HEARING ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM TO SEPTEMBER 19, 2022 ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. PLAINTIFF XAVIER HERNDON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT REVOLUTION RACING TEAM/IMPORTRIX IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. DUE TO CLERICAL ERROR REGARDING PROOF OF SERVICE ISSUES, THE JUDGMENT ENTERED ON OCTOBER 1, 2021, IS VACATED. PLAINTIFF'S PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON AUGUST 23, 2021, IS NOT VALID. THE CORRECT AGENT FOR SERVICE FOR DEFENDANT REVOLUTION RACING TEAM/IMPORTRIX WAS NOT SERVED PURSUANT TO THE SERVICE INFORMATION LISTED WITH THE CALIFORNIA SECRETARY OF STATE. THE CORRECT AGENT FOR SERVICE IS IDENTIFIED AS JESSICA PARTENO AT 780 LEIGH AVE. SAN JOSE, CA 95128. PLAINTIFF NEEDS TO RE-SERVE HIS CLAIM TO THE CORRECT AGENT FOR SERVICE FOR DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF IS PROVIDED A COPY OF THE MOST CURRENT SECRETARY OF STATE STATEMENT OF INFORMATION LISTING THE CORRECT INFORMATION FOR SERVICE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT. JUDGE PRO TEM: WILLIAM LYNN; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HERNDON, XAVIER ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
ORDER CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE. MATTER CONTINUED TO AUG-31-2021 AT 10:00 A.M. TO CURE PROOF OF SERVICE. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT)
ORDER OF EXAMINATION ISSUED AS TO THIRD PARTY ALVAREZ, JOEL HEARING SET FOR JUN-13-2022 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
REMARK:RETURN MAIL RECD 6/24/22. BENCH LETTER MAILED TO JOEL ALVAREZ-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED.
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR FOR NEW HEARING ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. HEARING SET FOR SEP-19-2022 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $40-WAIVED) SERVED JUN-15-2021, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT REVOLUTION RACING TEAM./ IMPORTRIX

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-23-2021 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE TO AUG-31-2021 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF XAVIER HERNDON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT REVOLUTION RACING TEAM/IMPORTRIX IS NOT PRESENT. COURT DISCLOSURE REGARDING CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS IS MADE. COURT DISCUSSES PROOF OF SERVICE ISSUES WITH PLAINTIFF. COURT INSTRUCTS PLAINTIFF THAT HE NEEDS TO FILE HIS PROOF OF SERVICE. IN ROOM 103. MATTER IS CONTINUED FOR ONE WEEK TO CURE THE UNTIMLY SERVICE ISSUE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED. (506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-31-2021 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO SEP-30-2021 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF INFORMED THE COURT OF A MEDICAL EMERGENCY AND REQUESTS A CONTINUANCE. HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG STRIKES THE DISMISSAL OF AUG-31-2021 AND ALLOWS THIS CONTINUANCE. NO FUTHER SERVICE IS REQUIRED ON THE DEFENDANT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER OF EXAMINATION RETURNED SERVED, SERVICE DATE: MAY-10-2022 (FEE FOR SERVICE:$40.00<WAIVED>) AS TO THIRD PARTY ALVAREZ, JOEL
ORDER RESETTING CASE FOR TRIAL.
